text.title: domain-driven-design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the domain-driven-design methodology end-to-end.

step.name: interview-domain-expert
step.action: Capture ubiquitous-language terms + invariants per entity.

step.name: identify-aggregate-roots
step.action: Pick aggregate roots; group owned entities; map invariants.

step.name: scaffold-domain-module
step.action: Author entities, value objects, repositories interfaces in domain/.

step.name: enforce-framework-purity
step.decision-gate: If any framework import in domain/, STOP and refactor before continuing.
